mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL(MAX(SUBSTRING(UNO,10,3)),0)+1 AS 'MAXNO' FROM USER WHERE SUBSTRING(UNO,2,8) = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USER (UNO, UNAME, UID, UPW, UBIRTH, UADDR, UGENDER, UPHONE, UMAIL, UINSERTDATE, UUPDATEDATE, UDELETEYN) VALUES (#{uno}, #{uname}, #{uid}, #{upw}, #{ubirth}, #{uaddr}, #{ugender}, #{uphone}, #{umail}, NOW(), NOW(), 'Y')
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(UID) FROM USER WHERE UID = #{uid}
SELECT * FROM USER WHERE UDELETEYN = 'Y' AND UID = #{uid}
mapper.update: UPDATE USER SET UNAME = #{uname}, UBIRTH = #{ubirth}, UGENDER = #{ugender}, UADDR = #{uaddr}, UPHONE = #{uphone}, UMAIL = #{umail}, UUPDATEDATE = NOW() WHERE UNO = #{uno}
UPDATE USER SET UDELETEYN = 'N', UUPDATEDATE = NOW() WHERE UNO = #{uno}
mapper.select:
SELECT UNO, UNAME, UID, UBIRTH, UPHONE, UINSERTDATE FROM USER WHERE UDELETEYN = 'Y'
ORDER BY UINSERTDATE ASC, UNAME DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
mapper.update: UPDATE USER SET UPW = #{upw}, UUPDATEDATE = NOW() WHERE UID = #{uid}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM USER WHERE UDELETEYN = 'Y'
